title: Zombie capital recovery strategy and adaptive liquidation
summary: Add zombie classification (HARD_ZOMBIE/SOFT_ZOMBIE/FAKE_LIQUID) with recovery attempt tracking, expose capital estimates for stuck positions (locked/recoverable/dead SOL) in cycle summary/events, and implement a safe partial liquidation path for FAKE_LIQUID by shrinking requested exit size. Integrate recovery_priority_level into derived policy output. No new external services; no additional RPC; preserves T-013..T-018 behavior.
why_safe: Classification/estimation are additive metadata and do not change settlement truth.
Partial liquidation only reduces exit size under FAKE_LIQUID conditions; it cannot create new buys or bypass safety guards.
Probe cadence remains bounded (no spamming) and FINAL_ZOMBIE lifecycle remains intact.
commit_message: Add zombie capital recovery strategy and adaptive liquidation
notes_for_cursor: Scope limited to models/runtime_policy/trader + focused zombie recovery tests and workflow artifacts.
